---
title: "04 Picard MarkDuplicates"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Remove duplicate reads from sorted BAM files using Picard `MarkDuplicates`.

# Inputs

- Sorted BAMs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/2.alignment/<sample>/<sample>.srt.bam`
- Sample list: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/2.alignment/alignment_samples.list`

# Outputs

- Deduplicated BAMs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/picard/<sample>/<sample>_picard_dedup.bam`
- Picard metrics: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/picard/<sample>/<sample>_picard_metrics.txt`

# Script

- `scripts/04_picard_markduplicates/picard_markduplicates_array.sh`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW
sbatch --array=1-571%24 scripts/picard_markduplicates_array.sh
```
